Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS PHILLIP BRADY, CHRISTEN WILSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL VERIFIED RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FORM INTERROGATORIES.

Appearances: Ilan Rosen Janfaza of the Law Offices of Ilan Rosen Janfaza (310.550.1000) appearing via Court Call for plaintiffs and moving parties; No other appearances.

Mr. Janfaza informs the Court he provided late notice to counsel of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. The Court does not hear argument and adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking to compel further responses to discovery, motion is denied as Plaintiff failed to file a separate statement as required by the rules of court. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking verifications, no verifications are required as responses are objections only. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
